title: Zantedeschia lutwychei
taxonomy: Zantedeschia lutwychei is a species of flowering plant in the family Arumaceae. It is native to South Africa and is also known as the 'Lutwyche's calla lily'. The genus Zantedeschia is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as calla lilies. These plants are characterized by their white or yellowish spathes and are often cultivated for their ornamental value. Zantedeschia lutwychei is a perennial plant that thrives in moist and well-drained environments.
